'''chodhadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nubigenous|nubigenous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nubigenous|nubigenous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chodhadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodhadhithi|chodhadhithi]] || [[word:chodhadhiji|chodhadhiji]] || [[word:chodhadhishi|chodhadhishi]] || [[word:chodhadhiki|chodhadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodhadhuthuthu|chodhadhuthuthu]] || [[word:chodhadhujuju|chodhadhujuju]] || [[word:chodhadhushushu|chodhadhushushu]] || [[word:chodhadhukuku|chodhadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodhadhuthu|chodhadhuthu]] || [[word:chodhadhuju|chodhadhuju]] || [[word:chodhadhushu|chodhadhushu]] || [[word:chodhadhuku|chodhadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodhadhufthuf|chodhadhufthuf]] || [[word:chodhadhufjuf|chodhadhufjuf]] || [[word:chodhadhufshuf|chodhadhufshuf]] || [[word:chodhadhufkuf|chodhadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodhadhethe|chodhadhethe]] || [[word:chodhadheje|chodhadheje]] || [[word:chodhadheshe|chodhadheshe]] || [[word:chodhadheke|chodhadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodhadhothotho|chodhadhothotho]] || [[word:chodhadhojojo|chodhadhojojo]] || [[word:chodhadhoshosho|chodhadhoshosho]] || [[word:chodhadhokoko|chodhadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodhadhotho|chodhadhotho]] || [[word:chodhadhojo|chodhadhojo]] || [[word:chodhadhosho|chodhadhosho]] || [[word:chodhadhoko|chodhadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodhadhofthof|chodhadhofthof]] || [[word:chodhadhofjof|chodhadhofjof]] || [[word:chodhadhofshof|chodhadhofshof]] || [[word:chodhadhofkof|chodhadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chodhadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŠthĂŠ|chodhadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŠjĂŠ|chodhadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŠshĂŠ|chodhadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chodhadhĂŠkĂŠ|chodhadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chodhadhathatha|chodhadhathatha]] || [[word:chodhadhajaja|chodhadhajaja]] || [[word:chodhadhashasha|chodhadhashasha]] || [[word:chodhadhakaka|chodhadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chodhadhatha|chodhadhatha]] || [[word:chodhadhaja|chodhadhaja]] || [[word:chodhadhasha|chodhadhasha]] || [[word:chodhadhaka|chodhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chodhadhafthaf|chodhadhafthaf]] || [[word:chodhadhafjaf|chodhadhafjaf]] || [[word:chodhadhafshaf|chodhadhafshaf]] || [[word:chodhadhafkaf|chodhadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chodhadhasha|chodhadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodhadhshĂ«sha|chodhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodhadhrosha|chodhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodhadhmusha|chodhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodhadhyasha|chodhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodhadhnkshĂ«sha|gochodhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodhadhnkrosha|gochodhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodhadhnkmusha|gochodhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodhadhnkyasha|gochodhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chodhadhadhasha|chodhadhadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodhadhadhshĂ«sha|chodhadhadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodhadhadhrosha|chodhadhadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodhadhadhmusha|chodhadhadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodhadhadhyasha|chodhadhadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha|gochodhadhadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodhadhadhnkrosha|gochodhadhadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodhadhadhnkmusha|gochodhadhadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodhadhadhnkyasha|gochodhadhadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chedhĂŠdhasha|chedhĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha|chedhĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chedhĂŠdhrosha|chedhĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chedhĂŠdhmusha|chedhĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chedhĂŠdhyasha|chedhĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gochedhĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochedhĂŠdhnkrosha|gochedhĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochedhĂŠdhnkmusha|gochedhĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochedhĂŠdhnkyasha|gochedhĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chodhfadhasha|chodhfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chodhfadhshĂ«sha|chodhfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chodhfadhrosha|chodhfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chodhfadhmusha|chodhfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chodhfadhyasha|chodhfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochodhfadhnkshĂ«sha|gochodhfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochodhfadhnkrosha|gochodhfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochodhfadhnkmusha|gochodhfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochodhfadhnkyasha|gochodhfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
